task_completion.description: Log into OpenClinica and set the active study to Phase II Diabetes Trial.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica interface is visible, and 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' is shown as the active study (usually in the top header or study selection area).
A dataset creation screen or dataset list showing the name 'IDMC_Weekly_Safety' entered in the dataset name field.

task_completion.description: Include all available CRFs and items in the dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dataset item selection screen shows all available CRFs and items checked, selected, or added to the dataset.

task_completion.description: Select Tab-delimited format for the dataset export.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export or schedule configuration screen shows 'Tab-delimited' selected as the file format.

task_completion.description: Set the scheduled job name to 'IDMC_Monday_Extract'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scheduled job creation screen or scheduled jobs list shows 'IDMC_Monday_Extract' in the job name field.

task_completion.description: Schedule the export to run every Monday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scheduling configuration shows a recurring schedule with 'Monday' selected as the day of the week.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenClinica web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenClinica web UI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, curl, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenClinica application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard OpenClinica web application, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use automated scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing the execution of Python or bash scripts to inject the dataset or scheduled job directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Dataset Name: 'IDMC_Weekly_Safety'. Expected Job Name: 'IDMC_Monday_Extract'. Expected Schedule Day: 'Monday'. The active study must be 'Phase II Diabetes Trial'.
